title: Incrediworld
description: Datapack that makes your world incredible
body:
Datapack that makes your world incredible.

# Additions
### Incrediworld generation changes:
- Now overworld has roof
- Generation become more mossy
- World is divided into space and caves
- In space, you have a lot of space for building, but there you can't find any ores
- There is little place in caves, there have dangerous mobs, but in caves you can find a lot of ores
### Incrediworld progress patch:
- In Incrediworld you can't just mine wood and make crafting table
- You should follow a special progress path, reflected in the achievements
- You starts with making campfire and end up fighting with Wither

# Recommendation for installation
It is recommended to install this datapack when creating the world and use the default generation type
